primary.$description: Semantic action primary - for CTAs and key interactions, inherits from system brand primary

secondary.$description: Semantic action secondary - for less prominent interactions, inherits from system brand secondary

success.$description: Semantic feedback success - indicates successful state or positive result

error.$description: Semantic feedback error - indicates error state or negative result

warning.$description: Semantic feedback warning - indicates warning state or caution

default.$description: Semantic background default - main content areas

primary.$description: Semantic text primary - main content text

secondary.$description: Semantic text secondary - supporting information text
